entries.scope: Aircraft, Spacecraft, Contagion Tower, Plague Tower, Blight Drone, and Plague Zombie Infestation formations

special_rules.name: Implacable Advance
special_rules.text: No formations can March. All formations in the army receive a +1 modifier to their action test roll when attempting a Marshal action.

special_rules.name: Nurgle's Rot
special_rules.text: If a formation with Nurgle’s Rot assaults or is assaulted, and causes any enemy casualties during the activation Step 1.12.5 Resolve Attacks, add one Lesser Daemon to the Death Guard Daemon Pool after step 1.12.9 Winner consolidates. It has no effect if the enemy formation belongs to the Chaos faction, Nurgle.

special_rules.name: Transport
special_rules.text: Death Guard Rhino may transport two infantry units except Terminators, Death Guard Daemon Princes, Death Guard Beasts of Nurgle, and Chaos Spawn. Death Guard Land Raider may transport two infantry units; Terminators, Death Guard Daemon Princes, Death Guard Beasts of Nurgle, and Chaos Spawn take up two spaces each. Plague Tower may transport sixteen Great Unclean Ones or infantry units; Terminators, Death Guard Daemon Princes, Death Guard Beasts of Nurgle, Chaos Spawn, and Great Unclean Ones take up two spaces each.

special_rules.name: Nurgling Swarms transport rule
special_rules.text: Any Armoured Vehicle in the Death Guard list can transport one Nurgling Swarm unit in addition to any transport capacity it may already have. Any War Engine in the list can transport as many Nurgling Swarm units as its starting Damage Capacity in addition to any transport capacity it may already have.

special_rules.name: Daemonic Pact
special_rules.text: The formation may summon daemons from the Daemon Pool. One Lesser Daemon is added to the Death Guard Daemon Pool. The formation has Nurgle's Rot.

special_rules.name: Daemonic Focus
special_rules.text: Units with Daemonic Focus may keep summoned units in play when the formation rallies, provided the formation is not broken.

special_rules.name: Augment Summoning
special_rules.text: Units with Augment Summoning add the listed bonus to their summoning points when the formation summons daemons. The bonus stacks with the formation's normal summoning roll.

profiles.name: Death Guard Daemon Prince
abilities_or_notes: May have wings: gains Jump Pack. Speed increased to 30cm, armour reduced to 4+.
parse_warnings: Winged option is represented as a profile note; the printed table compresses the base and winged values.

profiles.name: Blightlord Terminators
parse_warnings: The printed table compresses the invulnerable save and weapon rows; the visible table was used conservatively.

profiles.name: Nurgling Swarm
abilities_or_notes: Nurgling Swarms that are lost in an assault do not count for combat resolution.

profiles.name: Plague Zombies
abilities_or_notes: Zombies may contest, but not control, objectives.

profiles.name: Death Guard Rhino
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units except Terminators, Death Guard Daemon Princes, Death Guard Beasts of Nurgle and Chaos Spawn.

profiles.name: Death Guard Land Raider
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units. Terminators, Death Guard Daemon Princes, Death Guard Beasts of Nurgle and Chaos Spawn take up two spaces each.

profiles.name: Death Guard Dreadnought
abilities_or_notes: Armed with Heavy Chem Launchers OR Powerfist and Twin Autocannon.

profiles.name: Desecrator
parse_warnings: The source page includes visible edit marks and compressed columns; the final visible Desecrator row was preserved conservatively.

profiles.name: Plague Hulk (test 070)
parse_warnings: The test 070 variant row is OCR-compressed; the visible table was used for the alternate weapons.

profiles.name: Plaguereaper
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Destroyed. Any units within 5cm of the model suffer a hit on a D6 roll of 4+.
parse_warnings: The printed weapon columns are compressed; the Plaguereaper rows were reconstructed conservatively from the visible table.

profiles.name: Plague Tower
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: One extra point of DC and D3 units being transported are killed; no armour saves allowed (owners choice).

profiles.name: Fester Titan
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Move it D6cm in a random direction. If it hits impassable terrain or another unit it stops and suffers an extra point of damage. If it staggers into or over any units they take a hit on a D6 roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Repugnant Titan
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Loses an extra point of damage and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a 5+.

profiles.name: Plaguelord Titan
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Loses an extra point of damage and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a 4+.

profiles.name: Plague Ship
abilities_or_notes: Plague Zombies are placed after the barrage as close as possible to the bombardment coordinates, using normal ZoC rules, then treating them as if they had arrived via Teleport.
parse_warnings: The Plague Ship row is very compressed in the source and the post-bombardment plague zombie note was preserved from the visible page 3 text.

profiles.name: Great Unclean One
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed; all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.

army_notes.name: Faction
army_notes.text: All formations in the army belong to the Chaos faction, Nurgle.

army_notes.name: Core / Elite / Support
army_notes.text: You may include any number of Core Formations, but only Plague Marine Retinues unlock Elite and Support Formations.

army_notes.name: Elite Limit
army_notes.text: Up to one Elite Formation may be included for each Plague Marine Retinue.

army_notes.name: Support Limit
army_notes.text: Up to two Support Formations may be included for each Plague Marine Retinue.

army_notes.name: Upgrade Limit
army_notes.text: Each formation may take up to four allowed upgrades once per formation.

army_notes.name: War Engines & Navy
army_notes.text: Up to one third of the army's total points may be spent on War Engines and Chaos Navy.

army_notes.name: Initiative 2+
army_notes.text: Blight Drone Swarm, Contagion Towers, Plague Towers, Plague Zombie Infestation, Hellblades, Helltalons, and Plague Ship formations have initiative 2+.

army_notes.name: Source Edits
army_notes.text: The PDF has visible red/blue strike-through edits on page 1; the final visible/current rows were preserved and any uncertain edits were documented in the audit.

extraction_warnings: The PDF contains visible red/blue strike-through edits on page 1; the final visible/current rows were preserved and uncertain edits were documented.
Plaguereaper Company and Plague Reapers are both present in the source but appear to refer to the same model family with different naming/spelling; both were preserved.
Deathshroud Terminator is mentioned in the Teleportarium upgrade text but no standalone Deathshroud profile appears on pages 2-3.
Desecrator, Plague Hulk, Plague Hulk (test 070), Plaguereaper, and Plague Ship rows are OCR-compressed and were reconstructed conservatively from the visible table text.
The shared Chaos rule wording for Daemonic Pact / Daemonic Focus / Augment Summoning was reused in short form where helpful; the profile abilities carry the rest of the details.
